name: Falinks

forms.name: Last-Soldier
forms.pokedexDescription: Even after losing its five troopers in battle, the Last Soldier refuses to retreat. Its fallen comrades continue to fight alongside their leader, empowering them with ghostly aura. This power allows it to face even the strongest armies without faltering.

forms.name: Gunslinger
forms.pokedexDescription: The five individuals stack on top of each other, acting as one. Their towering position allows them to more easily aim and fire with the cannons on their heads, with less risk of friendly fire. The brass on the top of the stack commands the bottom-most trooper and directs them in the direction it wants to go.

forms.name: Mega-Last-Soldier
forms.pokedexDescription: Through the power of Mega Evolution, the Last Soldier becomes one with its fallen troops. Theirs souls link together to form an unstoppable force able to topple a thousand armies.

forms.name: Mega-Gunslinger
forms.pokedexDescription: Through the power of Mega Evolution, all five troops combined together to form a tank. They work in unison to pilot the machine that is their body. The brass that make up the wheels of the treads get dizzy from rotating after long journeys.

forms.name: Mega
forms.pokedexDescription: Mega Falinks has taken on the ultimate battle formation, which can be achieved only if the troopers and brass have the strongest of bonds.

pokedexDescription: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass's orders are absolute.
